Meaning.Vi: thực phẩm chức năng; phụ gia; phần bổ sung
Meaning.En: A substance added to a product or diet to enhance its nutritional value or compensate for a deficiency.
Meaning.Example: Many people take a vitamin D supplement during the winter months.

Situation.Vi: Người tiêu dùng mua viên uống bổ sung vitamin tại hiệu thuốc.
Situation.En: A customer purchases a vitamin supplement at the pharmacy.

Meaning.Vi: bổ sung; thêm vào cho đầy đủ
Meaning.En: To add something to another in order to make up for a deficiency or improve completeness.
Meaning.Example: The report was supplemented with additional data from field research.

Situation.Vi: Bác sĩ kê đơn bổ sung sắt cho bệnh nhân bị thiếu máu.
Situation.En: The doctor prescribed iron supplements for the anemic patient.

Meaning.En: An additional section or issue added to a book, newspaper, or periodical, often containing extra or updated material.
Meaning.Example: The latest edition of the textbook includes a supplement on climate change.

Situation.Vi: Báo khoa học phát hành bản bổ sung chuyên sâu về công nghệ AI.
Situation.En: The scientific journal released a supplement dedicated to AI technologies.
